name: Mazevozky Prianiki (Russian Rye Honey Cookie)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: From "The Honey Cookbook" by Juliette Elkon.
1. Heat honey in a saucepan until thin.
2. Mix rye flour and cake flour in a separate pan, shaking constantly to prevent color change.
3. Remove the honey from heat.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the honey while continuously beating with a large spoon.
5. Continue beating until the dough comes off easily.
6. Shape as desired and cut into rounds using a round cutter.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) on a buttered sheet until well browned.
They will keep indefinitely.
Author's note: This is a stiff, chewy flat cookie with excellent flavor - wonderful for children.
